title: Cithriy #5644
definition:
Zithri = "protection of Jehovah"

 1) son of Uzziel and grandson of Kohath the son of Levi
    1a) more properly 'Sithri'
nasbUsage:
Definition: Zithri = "protection of Jehovah"

 1) son of Uzziel and grandson of Kohath the son of Levi
    1a) more properly 'Sithri'

    NASB:  a Levite
